title: ActionStateLog
description: Schema for logging the causal relationship between a raw audio state, a DAW action taken by an audio engineer, and the resulting mixed audio state. Used as training data for Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF).

session_id.description: Unique identifier for the mixing session.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the action was recorded.

engineer_id.description: Anonymised identifier for the audio engineer providing the feedback.

pre_action_state.description: Objective audio features measured from the raw/unprocessed track before the engineer's action.

action.description: The specific DAW parameter change made by the engineer.

post_action_state.description: Objective audio features measured from the track after the engineer's action has been applied.

subjective_feedback.description: Optional qualitative and quantitative rating provided by the engineer after the action.

AudioState.description: A snapshot of measurable, objective audio features at a point in time.

file_reference.description: Path or URI to the audio file this state was measured from.

duration_seconds.description: Duration of the audio clip in seconds.

sample_rate_hz.description: Sample rate of the audio file in Hz (e.g. 44100, 48000).

loudness_lufs.description: Integrated loudness measured in LUFS (Loudness Units relative to Full Scale) per ITU-R BS.1770.

loudness_range_lu.description: Loudness range (LRA) in Loudness Units, measuring dynamic variation.

true_peak_dbtp.description: True peak level in dBTP (decibels True Peak).

spectral_centroid_hz.description: Mean spectral centroid in Hz, representing the 'centre of mass' of the frequency spectrum (perceived brightness).

spectral_rolloff_hz.description: Frequency in Hz below which a set percentage (typically 85%) of the spectral energy is contained.

spectral_flatness.description: Spectral flatness (Wiener entropy), ranging from 0 (pure tone) to 1 (white noise).

rms_db.description: Root Mean Square energy level in dB.

zero_crossing_rate.description: Mean rate at which the signal changes sign, correlating with noisiness.

mfcc.description: Array of Mel-Frequency Cepstral Coefficients (MFCCs) representing timbral texture.

DawAction.description: A single parameter change made in a Digital Audio Workstation.

action_type.description: Category of the DAW processing action applied.

track_name.description: Name or identifier of the track on which the action was applied.

plugin_name.description: Name of the VST/AU plugin used, if applicable.

parameter_name.description: The specific plugin or DAW parameter that was changed (e.g. 'low_shelf_gain_db', 'attack_ms').

value_before.description: The parameter value before the action was applied.

value_after.description: The parameter value after the action was applied.

unit.description: Unit of measurement for the parameter value (e.g. 'dB', 'ms', 'Hz', '%').

intent_label.description: Free-text label describing the engineer's artistic intent (e.g. 'add warmth', 'reduce harshness', 'control dynamics').

SubjectiveFeedback.description: Qualitative and quantitative feedback from the engineer about the result of the action.

overall_rating.description: Overall satisfaction rating for the result on a scale of 1 (poor) to 5 (excellent).

perceptual_attributes.description: Ratings for specific perceptual qualities changed by the action.

warmth.description: Change in perceived warmth (-2 = much less warm, 0 = no change, +2 = much warmer).

notes.description: Free-text notes from the engineer describing the result or reasoning.
